meaning: n.浜嬩欢,鎰忓鍙戠敓鐨勪簨
examples: I had a mistaken view of what was happening.
I'm not suggesting that is what is happening.
There is very little likelihood of that happening.
"But around the world, there are things happening, it's not all doom and gloom, " he added.
When it comes to shopping, Qatar is the most happening place in the Middle East.
